pr.title: ClownCar: Frugendorff compression baseline + canonical DeltaNet integration

output.summary: Frugendorff crawler shares a recurrent block with loop-conditioned flow instructions and replaces DeltaNetMemory with the canonical chunk_delta_rule kernel to shrink/accelerate compression.
techniques: Weight-shared crawler with loop-specific flow instructions
Flat plus repeated block balance for param-efficient depth
Canonical chunk_delta_rule-based DeltaNet kernel replacing Python loop
